@graph.name: Pvt Ltd Registration in Arunachal Pradesh | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Pvt Ltd Registration in Arunachal Pradesh. From ₹8,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Private limited company registration under Companies Act 201. Contact +91 9

mainEntity.name: How much does Pvt Ltd registration cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC, DIN, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. 5-15 working days.

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for company registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: PAN & Aadhaar of directors, address proof, passport-size photos, registered office address proof (utility bill + NOC/rent agreement), and proposed company name.

mainEntity.name: How long does company registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: 5-15 working days from document submission. Same-day DSC issuance, 2-3 days for name approval, 3-7 days for incorporation certificate.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide pvt ltd registration services in Arunachal Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Arunachal Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Arunachal Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Arunachal Pradesh fall under ROC Shillong. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Arunachal Pradesh-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Arunachal Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Arunachal Pradesh: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
